# Prompt Log for AI-Generated Files (Assignment 3)

## Prompt 1: Python Script and Notebook
"Generate a Python CLI script and Jupyter notebook for linear regression with diagnostics. The script should accept <filename> <x_column> <y_column> as command-line arguments, use scipy.stats.linregress for slope/intercept/r and sklearn.metrics.mean_squared_error for MSE, and save an annotated scatter plot with the regression line as regression_plot_python.png."

## Prompt 2: R Script and Notebook
"Generate an R CLI script and Jupyter notebook for linear regression with diagnostics. The script should accept <filename> <x_column> <y_column> as command-line arguments, use lm() for model fitting, cor() for correlation coefficient, and calculate MSE manually. Save an annotated ggplot2 scatter plot with regression line as regression_plot_r.png."

## Prompt 3: Code Review
"Review the assignment3 branch diff from the main branch. Check for correct statistical calculations, proper error handling, plot annotation accuracy, and consistency between Python and R implementations. Identify any issues or suggestions for improvement."

## Prompt 4: README Generation
"Generate a README for a regression analysis project that includes diagnostics (slope, intercept, correlation coefficient, MSE) and annotated plots in both Python and R. Include a file listing, setup instructions, and example commands."
